WaterDemandNorms.name: Lodging or Rooming houses
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group A - Residential: Lodging or rooming houses providing sleeping accommodations for independent individuals with or without dining facilities.

WaterDemandNorms.name: One or two-family private dwellings (HIG/MIG)
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group A - Residential: One- or two-family private dwellings designated for High Income Group (HIG) and Middle Income Group (MIG) as per official building plan details or carpet area parameters.

WaterDemandNorms.name: One or two-family private dwellings (LIG/EWS)
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group A - Residential: One- or two-family private dwellings designated for Low Income Group (LIG) and Economically Weaker Sections (EWS), where carpet area is less than 40 sqm.

WaterDemandNorms.name: Servant Quarters (Area 11-25 sqm / >25 sqm)
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group A - Residential: Servant quarters attached to private dwellings with an area baseline between 11 sqm and 25 sqm, or exceeding 25 sqm.

WaterDemandNorms.name: Servant Room attached to DUs (<11 sqm)
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group A - Residential: Minor servant rooms attached to primary dwelling units featuring a compact area configuration of less than 11 sqm.

WaterDemandNorms.name: Dormitories/Orphanages/Dharamshala/Hostel
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group A - Residential: Group housing settings including collective dormitories, orphanages, traditional Dharamshalas, and student or working hostels.

WaterDemandNorms.name: Apartment houses (flats) (HIG/MIG)
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group A - Residential: High-density multi-story apartment blocks and residential flats classified under HIG/MIG profiles.

WaterDemandNorms.name: Apartment houses (flats) (LIG/EWS)
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group A - Residential: Multi-family housing societies and flat installations designated for LIG/EWS demographics with smaller individual floor plans.

WaterDemandNorms.name: Hotels
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group A - Residential: Standard non-starred commercial hotels providing transient lodging, boarding services, and guest accommodations.

WaterDemandNorms.name: Hotels (Starred)
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group A - Residential: Star-category luxury hotels offering upscale hospitality services with specialized high-volume consumption demands.

WaterDemandNorms.name: Colleges / School / Training Institutions
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group B - Educational: All academic centers, schools, colleges, universities, and technical training institutions, incorporating shift variations.

WaterDemandNorms.name: Hospitals and Sanatoria (Hospitals >=2500 sqm)
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group C - Institutional: Large-scale healthcare facilities, hospitals, and medical sanatoria situated on plot areas equal to or greater than 2500 sqm.

WaterDemandNorms.name: Custodial Institutions
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group C - Institutional: Care, rehabilitation, and custodial housing units including homes for the aged, infirm, orphanages, or long-term care settings.

WaterDemandNorms.name: Penal and Mental institutions
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group C - Institutional: Corrective and restrictive detention layouts, including prisons, correctional facilities, reformatories, and mental health asylums.

WaterDemandNorms.name: Buildings with theatrical or motion picture stage (>1000 fixed seats)
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group D - Assembly: Buildings where 50 or more people gather for recreation, social, religious, patriotic, civil, or amusement purposes. Includes theatres, motion picture houses, assembly halls, auditoria, exhibition halls, museums, skating rinks, gymnasiums, places of worship, dance halls, club rooms, passenger stations, air/surface/marine terminals, recreation piers, stadia, and Court Rooms/SQM Office/RTO for assembly, containing fixed/loose seating structures for over 1000 persons.

WaterDemandNorms.name: Assembly without permanent stage (>=300 persons)
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group D - Assembly: Buildings where 50 or more people gather for recreation, social, religious, patriotic, civil, or amusement purposes. Includes theatres, motion picture houses, assembly halls, auditoria, exhibition halls, museums, skating rinks, gymnasiums, places of worship, dance halls, club rooms, passenger stations, air/surface/marine terminals, recreation piers, stadia, and Court Rooms/SQM Office/RTO for assembly, configured without a permanent stage but handling accommodation capacities of 300 or more occupants.

WaterDemandNorms.name: Assembly without permanent stage (<300 persons)
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group D - Assembly: Buildings where 50 or more people gather for recreation, social, religious, patriotic, civil, or amusement purposes. Includes theatres, motion picture houses, assembly halls, auditoria, exhibition halls, museums, skating rinks, gymnasiums, places of worship, dance halls, club rooms, passenger stations, air/surface/marine terminals, recreation piers, stadia, and Court Rooms/SQM Office/RTO for assembly, matching low-scale halls accommodating fewer than 300 individuals without regular fixed stages.

WaterDemandNorms.name: Temporary structures designed for assembly at ground level
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group D - Assembly: Buildings where 50 or more people gather for recreation, social, religious, patriotic, civil, or amusement purposes. Includes theatres, motion picture houses, assembly halls, auditoria, exhibition halls, museums, skating rinks, gymnasiums, places of worship, dance halls, club rooms, passenger stations, air/surface/marine terminals, recreation piers, stadia, and Court Rooms/SQM Office/RTO for assembly, representing temporary physical pavilions, exhibition tents, or ground structures.

WaterDemandNorms.name: Mixed recreation occupancies (Shopping + Cinemas)
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group D - Assembly: Buildings where 50 or more people gather for recreation, social, religious, patriotic, civil, or amusement purposes. Includes theatres, motion picture houses, assembly halls, auditoria, exhibition halls, museums, skating rinks, gymnasiums, places of worship, dance halls, club rooms, passenger stations, air/surface/marine terminals, recreation piers, stadia, and Court Rooms/SQM Office/RTO for assembly, combining multiple recreational options like multi-screen cineplex complexes, mixed commercial hubs, and retail shopping walkways.

WaterDemandNorms.name: Restaurants/Canteen/Pantry
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group D - Assembly: Buildings where 50 or more people gather for recreation, social, religious, patriotic, civil, or amusement purposes. Includes theatres, motion picture houses, assembly halls, auditoria, exhibition halls, museums, skating rinks, gymnasiums, places of worship, dance halls, club rooms, passenger stations, air/surface/marine terminals, recreation piers, stadia, and Court Rooms/SQM Office/RTO for assembly, capturing active commercial restaurants, corporate offices canteens, eating establishments, and industrial kitchen units.

WaterDemandNorms.name: Petrol pumps
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group D - Assembly: Buildings where 50 or more people gather for recreation, social, religious, patriotic, civil, or amusement purposes. Includes theatres, motion picture houses, assembly halls, auditoria, exhibition halls, museums, skating rinks, gymnasiums, places of worship, dance halls, club rooms, passenger stations, air/surface/marine terminals, recreation piers, stadia, and Court Rooms/SQM Office/RTO for assembly, representing automotive fueling stations and related roadside services computed on total plot area parameters.

WaterDemandNorms.name: Offices, banks, professional establishments
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group E - Business / Commercial: Commercial complexes, corporate offices, public/private banks, and professional setups like chambers for architects, engineers, doctors, or lawyers; police stations, beauty parlors, saloons, and private medical clinics running without intensive inpatient bed configurations.

WaterDemandNorms.name: Laboratories, research establishments, libraries
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group E - Business / Commercial: Scientific research zones, chemical/analytical laboratories, test houses, and library resources tracking standard daily commercial workflows.

WaterDemandNorms.name: Computer installations
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group E - Business / Commercial: Enterprise data centers, server rooms, internet hosting hubs, and computer software parks managing tech assets.

WaterDemandNorms.name: Telephone exchange
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group E - Business / Commercial: Core telecommunication rooms, network exchanges, signal switching grids, and electronic routing stations.

WaterDemandNorms.name: Broadcasting stations and TV stations
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group E - Business / Commercial: Media production houses, audio recording studios, public broadcasting setups, and live television transmission networks.

WaterDemandNorms.name: Shops, stores, departmental stores, markets
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group F - Mercantile: Any building or part of a building used as retail shops, product showrooms, wholesale distribution points, departmental stores, commercial shopping complexes, or marketplace blocks. Storage and service facilities incidental to the sale of merchandise and located in the same building are included.

WaterDemandNorms.name: Underground shopping centers
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group F - Mercantile: Below-grade subterranean retail markets, basement shopping pathways, and underground trading concourses. Storage and service facilities incidental to the sale of merchandise and located in the same building are included.

WaterDemandNorms.name: Industrial / Fabrication plants / Laundries / Power Plants
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group G - Industrial: Any building or part of a building or structure in which products or materials of all kinds and properties are fabricated, assembled, manufactured, or processed. Includes heavy assembly plants, industrial engineering laboratories, dry cleaning plants, electricity power plants, generating units, pumping stations, fumigation chambers, commercial laundries, gas plants, refineries, dairies, sawmills, and related handling infrastructure.

WaterDemandNorms.name: Warehouses, cold storage, depots, Electric grid stations
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group H - Storage: (A) Any building or part of a building used primarily for the storage or sheltering (including servicing, processing, or repairs incidental to storage) of goods, ware, merchandise, vehicles, or animals. Includes public/private warehouses, commercial cold storage units, freight transit depots, and heavy utility Electric Sub-Stations / Electric distribution grids.

WaterDemandNorms.name: Approved Multilevel Parking
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group H - Storage: Approved multi-tier automotive structures, public parking grids, and elevated or underground vehicle parking plazas.

WaterDemandNorms.name: Cremation Ground / Burial Ground
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group H - Storage: Dedicated local funeral grounds, cemetery facilities, electric cremation parks, and traditional burial compounds.

WaterDemandNorms.name: Golf Course / Sports Complex
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group H - Storage: Expansive outdoor sports facilities, premium golf courses, municipal stadiums, athletics layouts, and sports club fields.

WaterDemandNorms.name: Hazardous Buildings (combustible/poisonous/explosives)
WaterDemandNorms.description: Group J - Hazardous: Any building or part of a building used for the storage, handling, manufacture, or processing of highly combustible, poisonous, or explosive materials or products which are liable to burn with extreme rapidity and/or may produce poisonous fumes or explosions during handling and processing.
